description: Nx monorepos (detected via nx.json at repo root - note this is a coincidental name collision: Nx's own project config file is genuinely called `nx.json`, same as this template file, but they live in different directories and don't otherwise relate).

plugins.description: Official Nx/Nrwl plugin (github.com/nrwl/nx-ai-agents-config, also surfaced as nx-ai-agents-config) - workspace exploration, code generation via generators, task running (affected/run-many), workspace-package linking (npm/yarn/pnpm/bun), autonomous CI monitoring/self-healing via Nx Cloud MCP. Shipped by the Nx team itself (nx.dev/blog/nx-ai-agent-skills), 'Excellent' maintenance rating, actively updated. Free for the skill/generator/MCP-server usage; Nx Cloud self-healing CI has a paid tier at scale but core plugin usage is free. Setup can also be done via `npx nx configure-ai-agents`.

_notes: marketplace_add source repo (nrwl/nx-ai-agents-config) is a best-effort guess from research - VERIFY the exact marketplace add path with `npx nx configure-ai-agents` or Nx's own docs (nx.dev/blog/nx-ai-agent-skills) before relying on it; unlike the other ids in this bundle it was not independently confirmed against a live `claude plugin marketplace add` run.
